llvm::MDTupleInfo Struct Reference

DenseMapInfo for MDTuple. More...

#include <LLVMContextImpl.h>

Classes

struct  KeyTy

Static Public Member Functions

static MDTuple * getTombstoneKey ()

static bool isEqual (const KeyTy &LHS, const MDTuple *RHS)
static bool isEqual (const MDTuple *LHS, const MDTuple *RHS)

Detailed Description

DenseMapInfo for MDTuple.

Note that we don't need the is-function-local bit, since that's implicit in the operands.
